allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command '[Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; $excel = New-Object -ComObject Excel.Application; $excel.Visible = $false; $excel.DisplayAlerts = $false; $wb = $excel.Workbooks.Open\("D:\\LongManten\\TKAPI\\TKAPI_ListEmployee.xlsx"\); foreach \($sheet in $wb.Sheets\) { Write-Output "=== SHEET $\($sheet.Name\) ==="; $ur = $sheet.UsedRange; for \($r = 1; $r -le [Math]::Min\($ur.Rows.Count, 100\); $r++\) { $row = @\(\); $has = $false; for \($c = 1; $c -le [Math]::Min\($ur.Columns.Count, 20\); $c++\) { $v = $ur.Cells.Item\($r, $c\).Text; if \($v -ne ""\) { $has = $true }; $row += $v }; if \($has\) { Write-Output \("Row" + $r + ": " + \($row -join " | "\)\) } } }; $wb.Close\($false\); $excel.Quit\(\)')

Bash(powershell.exe -Command '[Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; $excel = New-Object -ComObject Excel.Application; $excel.Visible = $false; $excel.DisplayAlerts = $false; $wb = $excel.Workbooks.Open\("D:\\LongManten\\TKAPI\\TKAPI_ListEmployee.xlsx"\); $sheet = $wb.Sheets.Item\(3\); $ur = $sheet.UsedRange; for \($r = 49; $r -le [Math]::Min\($ur.Rows.Count, 150\); $r++\) { $row = @\(\); $has = $false; for \($c = 1; $c -le [Math]::Min\($ur.Columns.Count, 25\); $c++\) { $v = $ur.Cells.Item\($r, $c\).Text; if \($v -ne ""\) { $has = $true }; $row += $v }; if \($has\) { Write-Output \("Row" + $r + ": " + \($row -join " | "\)\) } }; $wb.Close\($false\); $excel.Quit\(\)')

Bash(powershell.exe -Command '[Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; $excel = New-Object -ComObject Excel.Application; $excel.Visible = $false; $excel.DisplayAlerts = $false; $wb = $excel.Workbooks.Open\("D:\\LongManten\\TKAPI\\TKAPI_ListEmployee.xlsx"\); $sheetCount = $wb.Sheets.Count; Write-Output "Total sheets: $sheetCount"; for \($s = 4; $s -le $sheetCount; $s++\) { $sheet = $wb.Sheets.Item\($s\); Write-Output "=== SHEET $s $\($sheet.Name\) ==="; $ur = $sheet.UsedRange; for \($r = 1; $r -le [Math]::Min\($ur.Rows.Count, 150\); $r++\) { $row = @\(\); $has = $false; for \($c = 1; $c -le [Math]::Min\($ur.Columns.Count, 25\); $c++\) { $v = $ur.Cells.Item\($r, $c\).Text; if \($v -ne ""\) { $has = $true }; $row += $v }; if \($has\) { Write-Output \("Row" + $r + ": " + \($row -join " | "\)\) } } }; $wb.Close\($false\); $excel.Quit\(\)')
